intent: Calculate a SHA-256 checksum for a file
explanation: Prints a SHA-256 checksum to verify file integrity.

intent: Change current directory
explanation: Changes the current shell working directory.

intent: change file or directory permissions
explanation: Changes file or directory permission bits.

intent: Change file owner and group
explanation: Updates file ownership to the specified user and group.

intent: Change ownership recursively for a directory tree
explanation: Changes ownership for all files and directories under a path.

flags.description: Affect symlink itself instead of target.

intent: change the current directory
explanation: Changes the current shell directory.

intent: Change the group ownership of a file
explanation: Changes the group owner of the target file or directory.

intent: change the group ownership of a file
explanation: Changes group ownership.

intent: change the owner of a file or directory
explanation: Changes owner and group of files.

intent: check access permissions for a specific user on a file
command_template: sudo -u {user} test -{permission} {file} && echo yes || echo no
explanation: Tests whether a user can access a file with specific permission.

intent: check if a host is reachable over the network
explanation: Tests network reachability and latency.

intent: check public IP address
explanation: Shows your internet-facing IP address.

intent: check system uptime and load average
explanation: Shows uptime and load averages.

intent: Check whether a file is executable
explanation: Returns status code indicating whether the path is executable.

intent: Check whether current user can read a path
explanation: Returns status code indicating whether the path is readable by the current user.

intent: Check whether current user can write to a path
explanation: Returns status code indicating whether the path is writable by the current user.

intent: check who can read write or execute a file
explanation: Displays permissions and ownership details.

intent: Compare two files line by line
explanation: Shows line-by-line differences between two files.

intent: Compress files into a tar.gz archive
explanation: Creates a compressed tar.gz archive from files or folders.

intent: Compress files into a zip archive
explanation: Creates a zip archive from the given source path.

intent: compress or archive files and folders
explanation: Creates a compressed tar archive.

intent: connect to a remote server via SSH
explanation: Starts a secure remote shell session.

intent: Copy a directory recursively
explanation: Copies a directory and all nested files and folders.

intent: copy a file from one location to another
explanation: Copies a file or directory from source to destination.

intent: copy files to or from a remote server over SSH
explanation: Copies files securely over SSH.

intent: count lines words or characters in a file
explanation: Counts lines, words, bytes, or characters.

intent: Create a directory path
explanation: Creates a directory and any missing parent directories.

intent: create a new directory or folder
explanation: Creates a new directory.

intent: create a new empty file
explanation: Creates an empty file or updates timestamps.

intent: create a symbolic link to a file or directory
explanation: Creates a symbolic link.

intent: Create an empty file or update file timestamp
explanation: Creates an empty file if missing or updates its modified time.

intent: Delete a directory and everything inside
explanation: Deletes a directory and all nested files and folders.

flags.description: Delete directories and their contents recursively.

intent: Delete an empty directory
explanation: Removes a directory only if it is empty.

intent: delete or remove a file or directory
explanation: Permanently deletes files or directories.

intent: download a file from the internet
explanation: Downloads a file from a URL.

intent: Download a file with curl
explanation: Downloads content from a URL and saves it to a local file.

intent: Download a file with wget
explanation: Retrieves a file from a URL and writes it to a chosen path.

intent: Extract a tar.gz archive
explanation: Extracts a tar.gz archive into the target directory.

flags.description: Show files as they are extracted.

intent: Extract a zip archive
explanation: Extracts a zip archive into the specified folder.

intent: extract or unzip an archive file
explanation: Extracts a compressed archive.

intent: Fetch only HTTP headers from a URL
explanation: Sends a HEAD request to inspect response headers without downloading body content.

intent: Find files by extension
explanation: Finds files matching a specific extension under a path.

intent: find files or directories by name or pattern
explanation: Finds files and directories matching criteria.

intent: Find processes by name
explanation: Filters process list to entries matching a given name pattern.

intent: Find the largest files under a path
explanation: Lists the largest files in a directory tree to help locate space usage.

intent: find the process ID of a running program
explanation: Returns process IDs by name.

intent: find what process is using a specific port
explanation: Shows process bound to a port.

intent: Force delete a directory tree without prompts
explanation: Forcefully removes a directory tree without confirmation prompts.

intent: Force kill a process by PID
explanation: Immediately stops a process without allowing cleanup.

intent: get detailed information about a file including permissions and timestamps
explanation: Shows detailed file metadata.

intent: kill a process by name
explanation: Terminates processes matching a name.

intent: kill or terminate a running process
explanation: Sends a signal to a process.

intent: Kill processes by name pattern
explanation: Terminates all processes matching the supplied name pattern.

intent: Kill whatever is using a TCP port
explanation: Terminates processes using the specified TCP port.

flags.description: Kill processes accessing the file or socket.

intent: list all running processes
explanation: Lists running processes with CPU and memory usage.

intent: list files and directories in a folder
explanation: Lists files and directories in a path.

intent: List files in a directory with details
explanation: Lists files including hidden ones with detailed metadata.

intent: List listening and open network ports
explanation: Displays TCP and UDP sockets currently listening on the system.

intent: look up DNS information for a domain
explanation: Queries DNS records for a domain.

intent: make an HTTP request or test an API endpoint
explanation: Sends HTTP requests and outputs responses.

intent: Monitor live process activity
explanation: Opens an interactive live view of running processes and system usage.

intent: monitor system resources and processes interactively
explanation: Interactive process and resource monitor.

intent: move or rename a file or directory
explanation: Moves or renames files and directories.

intent: Ping a host to test network reachability
explanation: Sends ICMP echo requests to verify reachability and latency.

intent: Rename a file or directory
explanation: Renames a file or directory by moving it to a new name.

intent: Resolve a domain name to DNS records
explanation: Queries DNS to resolve a domain and related records.

intent: run a command in the background
explanation: Runs a command detached from terminal hangups.

intent: scan open ports on a host
explanation: Scans open ports and services on a host.

intent: schedule a one time command to run later
explanation: Schedules a one-time future command.

intent: Search for text inside files
explanation: Recursively searches file contents for a text pattern.

intent: search for text inside files
explanation: Searches for matching text in files.

intent: set default permissions for new files using umask
explanation: Sets the default mode mask for new files.

intent: Set file permissions recursively
explanation: Applies permission changes to all files and folders under a path.

flags.description: Report only when changes are made.

intent: Set file permissions with numeric mode
explanation: Sets file or directory permission bits using numeric or symbolic mode.

intent: Show ACL rules for a file or directory
explanation: Prints access control list entries with fine-grained permission rules.

intent: show active network connections and listening ports
explanation: Shows listening sockets and owning processes.

intent: Show block device and partition information
explanation: Displays disks, partitions, filesystems, and mount points.

intent: Show CPU and memory usage for a specific PID
explanation: Prints CPU and memory usage metrics for one process.

intent: show current working directory path
explanation: Prints current working directory.

intent: Show disk free and used space across filesystems
explanation: Reports free and used space for mounted filesystems.

intent: show disk usage of files and directories
explanation: Shows disk usage for a path.

intent: show memory usage and available RAM
explanation: Displays memory and swap usage.

intent: show network interfaces and their IP addresses
explanation: Displays interfaces and assigned addresses.

intent: show or flush the routing table
explanation: Displays current kernel routing table.

intent: Show process tree for a PID
explanation: Displays parent and child process relationships for a PID.

intent: Show who can read write or execute a file
explanation: Displays permission bits along with owner and group information.

flags.description: Use long listing with permission metadata.
Show directory entry instead of its contents.

intent: sync files between directories or to a remote server
explanation: Synchronizes files efficiently.

flags.description: Delete removed source files at destination.

intent: trace the network route to a host
explanation: Shows the packet path to a destination host.

intent: view large file contents page by page
explanation: Opens a file in an interactive pager.

intent: view the contents of a file
explanation: Prints a file's contents.

intent: view the first lines of a file
explanation: Shows the first lines of a file.

intent: view the last lines of a file
explanation: Shows ending lines, optionally following updates.
